scope: Public README and future enemy design note integration.
summary: Adds a GitHub-visible screenshot and a more humanized README description positioning Coheronia as a Terraria-inspired survival sandbox with civilization-sim pressure. Captures enemy families, tables, mini-bosses, major bosses, density/scaling guidance, loot philosophy, and expansion order as future implementation notes.
acceptance: README includes screenshot and humanized game description
Future civilization-rule direction is explicitly described
Enemy notes are captured in docs/FUTURE_ENEMY_DESIGN.md
Feature outline and handoff link the enemy notes as future/not-integrated material
decisions: Keep enemy notes in a dedicated future-design doc to avoid implying live integration
Use the v0.4 smoke screenshot already generated by validation
Describe future civilization mechanics in README without overstating current implementation
risks: Enemy families and bosses are planned content, not live gameplay
next_action: Push public README/enemy-notes update to GitHub.
